# Offgrid Training

> A private, offline workout tracker for iOS.

Offgrid Training is a workout tracker built for training without compromises. Your training data stays on your device — no accounts, no cloud, no ads, and no analytics.

## Features

- Log sets, reps, weight, duration, distance, and RPE
- Build workouts with the structure that fits your training
- Save reusable workout templates
- Track PRs and follow progress with charts
- Organize your exercise library with categories and variations
- Back up, restore, and transfer your data
- Export and share workout templates

## Privacy

- 100% offline — no internet required
- No account required
- No cloud sync
- No ads or advertising SDKs
- No analytics or third-party tracking
- All workout data stored locally on device
